mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, create_time, role, avatar, certification_reason FROM user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, create_time, role, avatar) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, NOW(), #{role}, #{avatar})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
username = #{username},
role = #{role},
avatar = #{avatar},
certification_reason = #{certificationReason},
WHERE id = #{id}
